body: Alphabet annual revenues exceeded $400 hundred billion for the first time This quarter: Search continued to accelerate with revenues
there will probably be talk of restructuring during this earnings announcement, right? r/NFEstock. •

Get the app Join now Sign in Over 4.4 million developers are now building with Gemini, our Gemini app is now on iOS and doing really well there, and we’re seeing great feedback on our latest thinking models. 2025 is going to be a big year for search innovation.
